configurations.name: PodPress
runtimeArgs: const h=require('http'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path');h.createServer((q,s)=>{let fp=p.join('C:/Users/Abdullah Bin Ata/Desktop/Clone Podpress/PodPress-Project',q.url==='/'?'index.html':q.url);try{const d=f.readFileSync(fp);const e=fp.endsWith('.css')?'text/css':fp.endsWith('.js')?'text/javascript':fp.endsWith('.png')?'image/png':'text/html';s.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':e});s.end(d);}catch(e){s.writeHead(404);s.end('Not found');}}).listen(8090);
